column1: # mdrcel corpus manifest (HLD section 6). Tab-separated, 5 columns:
# The three rows below are SYNTHETIC hand-crafted fixtures for downstream
# stage development -- they were NOT fetched from the live network.
# Re-fetching a URL means a NEW row + NEW snapshot, never editing an old one.
# CAVEAT -- EDGAR / table-heavy gap (deliberate, on record):
# These 3 fixtures cover only the wikipedia, hub_index, and edge_case shapes.
# They DELIBERATELY EXCLUDE the table-heavy `sec_edgar` shape -- precisely the
# the consumer breaking case and HLD gold members #3 (SEC 10-K), #5 (table-heavy
# SEC), #6 (table-heavy regulator). Therefore Stages 6-8 passing on this file
# is NOT evidence about EDGAR/table extraction or regulator filings. Real
# EDGAR/regulator snapshots are corpus-curation work (HLD section 11, item 4)
# and are MANDATORY before the section 2.7 gold-set baseline freeze. Do not
# treat green here as coverage of the weak point this harness exists to catch.
